title: Smart commit messages from beads context
description:
Make sync commit messages on refs/heads/beads/store more descriptive. Instead of 'sync: +1 created', show what actually changed:

- created bd-xxx: "Title here"
- updated bd-yyy desc: "new description"  
- closed bd-zzz: "reason"
- deleted bd-abc

This helps with debugging and auditing bead changes over time. Since these commits live on a separate ref (beads/store), they won't clutter the main code history.

title: Add daemon control commands (stop, restart, status)
description: Add subcommands to 'bd daemon' for controlling the daemon: stop, restart, status. Currently have to kill the process manually.

title: Refactor send_request and send_request_no_autostart to share common code
description:
## What's Wrong
send_request and send_request_no_autostart in src/daemon/ipc.rs duplicate the request encoding/response parsing logic.

## Where
- src/daemon/ipc.rs:828-838 (send_request)
- src/daemon/ipc.rs:844-859 (send_request_no_autostart)

## Why It Matters
If we change the wire format or add error handling, we need to update both places.

## Suggested Fix
Extract common send/receive logic into a helper that takes a stream.

title: Write migration guide for beads-go to beads-rs
description:
Document the migration path for users of the Go version to switch to Rust. Cover:

- Data format changes (if any)
- CLI differences
- New features in beads-rs
- How to migrate existing beads data

This helps adoption and shows the project is mature enough to replace the Go version.

title: Add bd binary to nix devshell
description: The nix flake devShell should include the bd binary so hooks like 'bd prime' work inside nix develop. Currently bd is only available after building from source.
